center.name: Joseph Smit
center.summary: Joseph Smit (18 July 1836 – 4 November 1929) was a Dutch zoological illustrator.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-winged grey warbler (Drymocichla incana) is a small to medium size bird in the family Cisticolidae that is native to Central Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ruddy tody-flycatcher (Poecilotriccus russatus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is native to the oriental tepuis of Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Tanimbar eclectus, or Riedel's eclectus (Eclectus riedeli) is a parrot species which is native to the Tanimbar Islands
